questions: sharire pani kom hole ki hoy
answers: Dehydration occurs when your body loses more fluids than it takes in. Symptoms include dry mouth, dark urine, dizziness, and fatigue. Drink water and ORS regularly to prevent it.
Dehydration hole mukh shukiye jay, peshab dark hoy, matha ghure, weakness lage. ORS/saline pani khaan, daab er pani khaan, ar dine minimum 8 glass pani khawa uchit.
To treat dehydration: sip water frequently, drink ORS solution, eat water-rich fruits like watermelon and cucumber. Severe dehydration with confusion or fainting needs IV fluids at a hospital.
Sharire pani kom hole kidney problem, headache, fatigue hoy. Beshi gorme, exercise er por, ba diarrhea te dehydration beshi hoy. Regular pani khaan — pyash na laglew pani khaben.
